summary: Iteration 30: All 3 NEW features tested and PASSED. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests. Frontend: All UI features verified including date filters, calls_made input, and PIF Churn removal from Details tab.
seed_data_creation: None - used real GHL data via PIT token
context_for_next_testing_agent: GHL API date filtering, calls_made editing, and PIF Churn removal all working correctly. Date filters on POST /api/ghl/sync return filtered results. PATCH /api/ghl/calls-made updates monthly_kpis collection. PIF Churn % removed from KPIDetailedView but General Churn and PT Churn remain.

test_categories: TestGHLSyncDateFilters (4 tests): POST /api/ghl/sync with/without date filters
TestGHLCallsMade (4 tests): PATCH /api/ghl/calls-made updates KPI, requires month, creates if not exists
TestGHLLastSync (1 test): Verifies last-sync reflects date filters used

features_verified: Navigate to Acquisition tab (funnel tab) - PASS
Date pickers (Date debut, Date fin) visible with native HTML date inputs - PASS
Appels passes input field visible with value input working - PASS
Sauvegarder button saves calls_made value (button turns green 'Sauvegarde') - PASS
Set date range 2025-01-01 to 2025-06-30, sync shows filtered data - PASS
PIF Churn % is NOT present in Details tab - PASS
General Churn (Général Churn) IS present showing 0.00% - PASS
PT Churn IS present showing 0.00% - PASS
